product_brief: FactrAI - an AI news-subscription product that helps everyday readers get past paywalls to access quality journalism.

criteria.desc: Page has a <meta name=viewport> tag for mobile responsiveness.
A primary CTA element (button or link styled as button) exists within the first 700px of vertical scroll (above the fold).
Every information-bearing visual has an accessible label: each has non-empty alt, AND each inline
Page includes schema.org structured data (a script[type='application/ld+json'] block).
There is exactly one primary CTA (one element with class or id containing 'cta-primary').
At 375px viewport width the page body does not scroll horizontally (no overflow).
Page opens as a standalone file with no external JS or server (no <script src> to remote URLs).
The H1 headline clearly communicates what the product does and for whom, in plain language.
The page presents a single, clear value proposition (not three competing messages).
The primary CTA text is an action phrase (e.g. 'Start free', 'Get the app'), not generic ('Submit', 'Click here').
No placeholder text remains (no 'lorem ipsum', no 'REPLACE_ME', no TODO).
